hallucination.rationale: The Review of Systems section fabricates negative findings for nearly every system (constitutional, cardiovascular, respiratory, genitourinary, musculoskeletal, psychiatric, etc.) that were never discussed in the transcript. Only GI (no nausea/diarrhea with metformin) and neurological (sensation intact) have any basis. The Social History also fabricates 'No information provided' for tobacco, alcohol, and recreational drugs, which were never discussed.
flagged_content: Constitutional: No fever, chills, fatigue, or weight changes noted.
HEENT: No vision, hearing, throat, or nasal symptoms noted.
Cardiovascular: No chest pain, palpitations, or edema noted.
Respiratory: No shortness of breath, cough, or wheezing noted.
Musculoskeletal: No joint pain, muscle weakness, or mobility issues noted.
Psychiatric: No mood, anxiety, or sleep issues noted.
Skin: No rashes, lesions, or wounds noted.

instruction_following.rationale: The template explicitly instructs to only include ROS systems that were discussed and to omit the section entirely if not mentioned, yet the note includes all systems with fabricated negatives. Template bracket/parenthetical instructions are left in the output throughout (e.g., '[Patient's primary reason for visit:', '(Only include plan elements that were specifically discussed)'). Social history items not mentioned should have been omitted per instructions.

completeness.rationale: Several important items from the transcript are missing or inadequately captured.
missed_items: Dietary changes (less rice, more vegetables, mindful about treats)
Exercise details (water aerobics twice weekly at the Y, gardening)
Annual eye exam in February with Dr. Okafor with normal findings
Sister lost a toe from diabetes complications (placed in Objective instead of Family History)
Past medical history should include diabetes

template_adherence.rationale: Template bracket instructions and parenthetical instructions are left in the output throughout. Vital signs section is placed after the physical exam instead of before. Counseling content and family history (sister's toe) are misplaced into the Objective/Physical Examination section. Kidney labs are placed in Physical Examination rather than being noted as lab results.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted. There are no {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} tags anywhere in the note despite multiple drugs (metformin) and conditions (diabetes) being mentioned.

duplication.rationale: No significant duplication of sections or content was observed.
